meta.title: How to Swap Crypto Instantly from $0.30 | MRC GlobalPay
meta.description: How do you swap 500+ cryptocurrencies with no registration? MRC GlobalPay settles in under 60 seconds, non-custodial, from $0.30. Canadian MSB licensed.
meta.ogTitle: How to Buy & Swap Crypto from $0.30 — No Account Needed | MRC GlobalPay

footer.disclaimer: MRC GlobalPay is a registered Canadian MSB. We provide a registration-free service for most users. To maintain safety and compliance with global AML standards, our automated risk-prevention system may occasionally request standard verification for transactions flagged as high-risk.

hero.heading: Instant Crypto Swap.
hero.subtitle: Fast, secure, and private. Direct wallet-to-wallet swaps from $0.30.
hero.dustDescription: Tired of "unspendable" dust? Most platforms have high minimums. We support micro-swaps starting at $0.30. Convert leftover balances from 500+ tokens instantly with zero onboarding.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps. No delays, no friction.

step1.title: Input Details
step1.description: Select your swap pair and enter the recipient wallet address. No sign-up needed. Swaps from $0.30.

step2.title: Send Deposit
step2.description: Transfer your funds to the secure, one-time generated deposit address.

step3.title: Automatic Settlement
step3.description: Once your deposit is confirmed, coins are automatically sent to your wallet.

features.heading: Built for Speed. Engineered for Trust.
features.subtitle: Every component is optimized for instant execution and zero friction.

speed.title: Sub-60s Settlement
speed.description: Automated liquidity rails execute swaps in under 60 seconds. No manual processing, no queues.

fees.title: Zero Hidden Fees
fees.description: All costs are transparent in the displayed rate. What you see is what you get — guaranteed.

noAccount.title: No Account Required
noAccount.description: Permissionless access — start swapping immediately. No sign-ups, no personal data, no onboarding friction.

assets.title: 500+ Crypto Assets
assets.description: Swap Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, USDT, and hundreds more across all major blockchains.

global.title: Global, Always-On
global.description: Available worldwide 24/7/365. No geo-restrictions, no downtime, no maintenance windows.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Dedicated support around the clock for any exchange-related questions or issues.

widget.noHiddenFees: No hidden fees · No account required · Permissionless
widget.findTransferDesc: Enter a wallet address or transaction ID
widget.noTransfersDesc: Wallet tracking works for all new swaps. Your next swap will appear here automatically.

widget.depositWarning: Please be careful not to deposit your {{ticker}} from a smart contract.
widget.weWillProcess: We will process your transaction even if you:
widget.tip1: Send a deposit in the wrong network, if this asset is supported on our service
widget.tip2: Create a transaction with a wrong coin
widget.tip3: Send more than one deposit for the same transaction
widget.tip4: Send a deposit long after the exchange was created or completed
widget.weWillNot: We will not be able to proceed on the initial terms if you:
widget.tipBad1: Send a deposit for a fixed-rate exchange after the rate expires, provided that the rate declines over this timeframe
widget.tipBad2: Make a transaction using the wrong contract address
widget.contactSupport: In these cases, we encourage you to contact our support team. The exchange can be continued from there, or alternatively, you are free to request a refund.
widget.cancel1: If you didn't send any funds yet, there is no need to cancel the transaction, you can simply create a new one
widget.cancel2: If you have already sent the funds for the exchange, immediately contact our support team for assistance
widget.wantEmailStatus: Want to get status on your email?
widget.subscribed: Subscribed! We'll notify you of updates.

bridge.noStorageNotice: We do not store your data. This receipt is your only record.

bridge.pdfFooter: Privacy First: MRC GlobalPay is non-custodial. This information is not stored on our servers. Please save this for your records.

buysell.heading: Instant Fiat-to-Crypto On-Ramp.
buysell.subtitle: Purchase crypto in seconds using your preferred local payment method. Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, PIX, SEPA — all supported. Direct to your self-custody wallet.

step1.title: Select Method
step1.description: Choose your local currency and payment rail — Visa, PIX, SEPA, or bank transfer.

step2.title: Secure Checkout
step2.description: Complete a fast, encrypted checkout through our regulated payment partners.

step3.title: Direct Wallet Delivery
step3.description: Crypto arrives directly in your self-custody wallet. No intermediary holds, no hidden fees.

bridge.heading: Permanent Automated Liquidity.
bridge.subtitle: Generate one reusable deposit address for automated, recurring crypto conversions. Ideal for miners, DAOs, and corporate treasury operations.

step1.title: Map Pair
step1.description: Select your source and destination assets. Configure the conversion pair once.

step2.title: Whitelist Address
step2.description: Generate a permanent deposit address. Use it for all future transfers — no reconfiguration needed.

step3.title: Automated Settlement
step3.description: Every deposit is automatically swapped and delivered to your destination wallet in real-time.

private.heading: Shielded Transaction Routing.
private.subtitle: Break the on-chain link between sender and receiver. Your funds are routed through shielded liquidity paths for clean, private delivery.

step1.title: Initiate
step1.description: Enter your transfer details. Select the asset pair and destination address.

step2.title: Shield
step2.description: Your transaction is routed through shielded liquidity pools, masking the direct wallet-to-wallet connection.

step3.title: Private Arrival
step3.description: The recipient receives funds with a clean on-chain history. No direct link to your operational wallet.
